label: Cloud Security Architect
description: Designs cloud security architecture at a strategic level — reference architectures, security patterns, cloud governance frameworks, and multi-cloud security strategy.

paths.name: AWS Architecture Track
paths.rationale: CCSP plus AWS Security Specialty is the recognized senior AWS security architect credential combination.
pros: CCSP is the most recognized senior cloud security credential globally
AWS Security Specialty validates deep AWS security engineering expertise
CCSK provides vendor-neutral cloud security framework foundation
cons: CCSP requires 5 years experience — cannot be accelerated

prerequisites.experience: 5 years IT security experience required for CCSP. Senior cloud security engineering experience specifically. Not a mid-level path.

cert_sequence.notes: CSA foundation — vendor-neutral cloud security framework establishing the governance and architecture language that underpins CCSP.
Deep AWS security engineering before architecture-level work. You design better architectures when you deeply understand what the security services actually do.

ISC2 Certified Cloud Security Professional — the senior cloud security architect credential. Cloud architecture, data security, platform security, application security, operations, and legal/compliance. Study with the official ISC2 CCSP study guide and Boson practice exams.

paths.name: Azure Architecture Track
paths.rationale: SC-100 is the Azure security architect credential; CCSP adds the vendor-neutral senior recognition.
pros: SC-100 increasingly required for senior Azure security architecture roles
CCSP adds vendor-neutral recognition alongside Microsoft stack
Relevant in the largest enterprise cloud deployments — Azure dominates enterprise
cons: Annual renewal cycles on Microsoft certifications

prerequisites.experience: Senior Azure security engineering experience. AZ-500 completion recommended before SC-100.

cert_sequence.notes: Microsoft Cybersecurity Architect — Azure security architect credential. Tests architectural judgment across Zero Trust design, security operations architecture, and governance. Harder than AZ-500 because it requires synthesis and design thinking.
Adds ISC2 senior cloud security credential that opens architecture roles outside Microsoft environments and provides vendor-neutral framework credibility that SC-100 alone cannot.
